How does this counter bonuses actually work?

Thanks for the help <@767916775001292820> and <@193043069275209728>

Counter deals damage back when enemy hits you = on enemy's turn/attack
As for the Wax girl, she increases the damage itself

I have seen builds out there that focus solely on Counter and completely forego attacking the enemy
Damage scaling from counter is nerfed by 70% in arc 2 ruleset, so you're only getting 30% of the intended bonus on Pandia's exalt and Winkle's cards
50% counter bonus = deal extra dmg equal to 50% of ur counter
but arc2 ruleset nerfs this by 70% so u only deal 50% x 70% or 15% of ur counter as extra dmg
